crime.value: Assault on police officer - Detective Sergeant Maura Terrazzo's face was brutally cut up
crime.quote: An Officer is down. Her face is so badly cut up, that her face looks like a T Subway-Rail Map.

victim.value: Detective Sergeant Maura Terrazzo - police officer conducting an investigation
victim.quote: Detective Sergeant Maura Terrazzo... wanted to give details of what happened and what is going on in this investigation

closed_world.value: Boston police department and associated locations - Atlantic Avenue Entrance to South Station area
closed_world.quote: All hell has broken loose at the Atlantic Avenue Entrance to South Station.

culprit_and_motive.value: Hispanic man and Caucasian male in his 50s with glasses - motive unclear from excerpt
culprit_and_motive.quote: composite showed an Hispanic Man and a Male Caucasian in his 50s. The one in his 50s wore glasses.

investigator.value: Southie O'Brien and Captain Jim Larkin - Boston police officers investigating the assault
investigator.quote: Southie got a call from Captain Jim Larkin... Meet me there.

suspect_architecture.value: Two-perpetrator attack on Detective Terrazzo: Hispanic male and Caucasian male in 50s with glasses, differentiated by physical description and roles in assault
suspect_architecture.quote: the composite showed an Hispanic Man and a Male Caucasian in his 50s. The one in his 50s wore glasses.

red_herring.value: Soriano's false sexual deviant allegations against Larkin, O'Brien, and Lafferty to remove witnesses and investigators
red_herring.quote: Soriano released findings, making all 3 sound like Sexual Deviants

social_world.value: Boston police department hierarchy with corrupt political interference, civil servants vs political types, institutional protection of wrongdoing
social_world.quote: Political Types are self promoters. They think that quantitative is the way to show that something has been done.

reveal_mechanic.value: Police sketch artist composite drawing revealing two distinct perpetrators based on victim's testimony
reveal_mechanic.quote: Boston PD Sketch Artists were brought into her room to get a drawing of the assailant

media_and_audience.value: City becomes circus-like entertainment with rappers on Boston Common while crime rises and police effectiveness diminishes
media_and_audience.quote: Circus Et Panem Maximus style entertainment, in the form of Rappers on the Boston Common, the city was indeed a circus

investigator_wound.value: Southie's trauma from witnessing repeated violence and bloodshed around him, feeling drained by constant exposure to brutality
investigator_wound.quote: It's as if all he's seen is everybody's blood spilled around him. He went home, drained from all of this.
